items.title: Mississauga named Ontario’s Most Active Community in 2026 ParticipACTION Community Challenge
items.summary: The City of Mississauga has been named Ontario's Most Active Community in the 2026 ParticipACTION Community Challenge presented by Novo Nordisk. As part of the recognition, the City will receive $5,000 to support physical activity and sport initiatives in the community. This recognition reflects the City’s commitment to promoting active healthy living for residents of all ages and abilities. ParticipACTION is a national initiative that encourages people and communities across Canada to be active through recreation, sport and everyday movement.

Woman, 18, charged with attempted murder after teen stabbed on bus: Peel police
items.summary: An 18-year-old woman has been charged with attempted murder after a teen was stabbed on board a transit bus in Mississauga, Ont, police say.

items.title: Read, play and create your summer adventures at the library
items.summary: Book lovers, storytellers and challenge-seekers: your summer adventure is waiting at the library! Explore the collection, watch live shows, take on challenges and win prizes. There is something for everyone to enjoy. Did you know that you can borrow video games or play kits from the library? Your library card gives you access to a wide range of activities and resources to enjoy during the summer. Mississauga Library offers many programs, activities and events year-round.

items.title: Thunderstorms and heavy rain expected in Mississauga today
items.summary: Storm activity may develop through the morning and continue into the afternoon, with the greatest risk for impacts expected later in the day. The Toronto and Region Conservation Authority (TRCA) and Credit Valley Conservation have issued a Flood Outlook Statement, and Environment and Climate Change Canada (ECCC) has issued a Yellow Level Severe Thunderstorm Watch for the area. Residents should be prepared for rapidly changing weather conditions, including heavy rain, strong winds and localized flooding.
